title: ds-viz-singlevalueicon - option matrix (light)
description: Test bench for splunk.singlevalueicon. Each panel exercises one option group: icon (default vs. inline SVG data URI), iconColor + iconOpacity + iconPosition (before / after), majorValue + unit + underLabel, trendDisplay (absolute / percent / off), shouldAbbreviateTrendValue + thousand separators, showValue (icon-only mode), majorFontSize, dynamic colour via DOS / rangeValue. SPL is makeresults-based.

options.query: | makeresults count=24 | streamstats count as i | eval _time = relative_time(now(), "-24h") + (i*3600) | eval revenue = round(8000 + 2000*sin(i/4) + random()%500) | table _time revenue

| makeresults count=24 | streamstats count as i | eval _time = relative_time(now(), "-24h") + (i*3600) | eval conversion_rate = round(2.5 + sin(i/4)*0.4 + random()%10/100, 2) | table _time conversion_rate

ds_currency_kpi.name: currency kpi - large value with trend

options.query: | makeresults count=24 | streamstats count as i | eval _time = relative_time(now(), "-24h") + (i*3600) | eval mrr = round(1245000 + i*1500 + random()%2000) | table _time mrr
| makeresults count=24 | streamstats count as i | eval _time = relative_time(now(), "-24h") + (i*3600) | eval health = round(85 + sin(i/4)*8 + random()%5) | table _time health
| makeresults count=24 | streamstats count as i | eval _time = relative_time(now(), "-24h") + (i*3600) | eval errors = round(12 + sin(i/3)*8 + random()%5) | table _time errors

options.markdown:
# `splunk.singlevalueicon` - option matrix

A `splunk.singlevalue` with a leading icon. The 10.4 reference exposes 16 options - the singlevalue option set MINUS `sparkline*` (no sparkline) and `backgroundColor` defaults to **transparent** (vs. theme background for singlevalue), PLUS four icon options: `icon`, `iconColor`, `iconOpacity`, `iconPosition`. **Only renders inside Absolute layout.** The `icon` value is either `"default"` (a generic Splunk square) or a `data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg ...>...</svg>` data URI.

viz_default_icon.title: 1. icon - default + showValue (default)
viz_default_icon.description: icon = 'default' renders the generic Splunk square. showValue = true (default) renders the major value + trend below the icon.

viz_svg_uri_check.title: 2. Inline SVG data URI - check / heart / lightning
viz_svg_uri_check.description: icon = data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg ...>. Use stroke='currentColor' so iconColor controls the colour. Anything renderable as inline SVG works (Lucide, Heroicons, Splunk Visual Library exports).

options.icon: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><polyline points='20 6 9 17 4 12'/></svg>

viz_icon_position_after.title: 3. iconPosition - after
viz_icon_position_after.description: iconPosition = 'after' moves the icon to the right of the value. Default is 'before'. Use 'after' when the icon is a meaningful suffix (a units glyph, a state indicator).

options.icon: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><polyline points='17 6 23 6 23 12'/><polyline points='23 6 13.5 15.5 8.5 10.5 1 18'/></svg>

viz_icon_only.title: 4. showValue - false (icon-only)
viz_icon_only.description: showValue = false hides BOTH the major value AND the trend - the panel is just the icon. Useful for status-light panels or visual breakers in a KPI strip.

options.icon: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><circle cx='12' cy='12' r='10'/><polyline points='12 6 12 12 16 14'/></svg>

viz_dynamic_iconColor.title: 5. Dynamic iconColor via rangeValue
viz_dynamic_iconColor.description: iconColor uses Dynamic Options Syntax to map the current value to a colour. Pattern: `> primary | seriesByName(field) | lastPoint() | rangeValue(thresholds)`. Icon turns green / amber / red based on health score.

options.icon: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M22 11.08V12a10 10 0 1 1-5.93-9.14'/><polyline points='22 4 12 14.01 9 11.01'/></svg>

viz_dynamic_majorColor.title: 6. Dynamic majorColor (number colour, fixed icon)
viz_dynamic_majorColor.description: iconColor stays a calm hue, majorColor flips on threshold. Reads as 'something is wrong with this metric' without losing the icon's identity. Common SOC pattern.

options.icon: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M10.29 3.86 1.82 18a2 2 0 0 0 1.71 3h16.94a2 2 0 0 0 1.71-3L13.71 3.86a2 2 0 0 0-3.42 0z'/><line x1='12' y1='9' x2='12' y2='13'/><circle cx='12' cy='17' r='1' fill='currentColor'/></svg>

viz_iconOpacity.title: 7. iconOpacity 0.3 - muted secondary metric
viz_iconOpacity.description: iconOpacity = 0.3 fades the icon. Use when the icon is decorative / categorisation rather than the message. The eye lands on the value first, the icon is context.

options.icon: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><line x1='18' y1='20' x2='18' y2='10'/><line x1='12' y1='20' x2='12' y2='4'/><line x1='6' y1='20' x2='6' y2='14'/></svg>

viz_no_trend.title: 8. trendDisplay - off (static KPI with icon)
viz_no_trend.description: Single-row data source, no time dimension. trendDisplay = 'off' suppresses the delta. The icon supplies meaning without needing recent history.

options.icon: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M9 11H1l3-3-3-3M15 17h8l-3 3 3 3M22 11l-3-3-3 3M2 17l3 3 3-3'/></svg>

viz_majorFontSize.title: 9. majorFontSize - 56 (compact KPI strip)
viz_majorFontSize.description: majorFontSize = 56 locks the value font size. Icon stays auto-sized. Useful when a row of singlevalueicon tiles needs visual consistency regardless of underlying value magnitude.

options.icon: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><line x1='12' y1='1' x2='12' y2='23'/><path d='M17 5H9.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 0 0 7h5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 0 7H6'/></svg>

viz_dynamic_bg.title: 10. Dynamic backgroundColor + locked majorColor
viz_dynamic_bg.description: Whole-tile background flips on threshold. majorColor + iconColor lock to white so the tile stays readable when the bg goes dark. Use sparingly - one or two of these is enough per dashboard.

options.icon: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><circle cx='12' cy='12' r='10'/><line x1='12' y1='8' x2='12' y2='12'/><circle cx='12' cy='16' r='1' fill='currentColor'/></svg>

viz_separators_off.title: 11. shouldUseThousandSeparators - false
viz_separators_off.description: shouldUseThousandSeparators = false strips commas. Use for IDs, sequence numbers, version numbers. Numbers like build IDs (1245000) read as IDs, not quantities, when commas are absent.

options.icon: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><circle cx='12' cy='12' r='10'/><polyline points='16 12 12 8 8 12'/><line x1='12' y1='16' x2='12' y2='8'/></svg>

viz_kpi_strip_compact.title: 12. Compact KPI strip pattern
viz_kpi_strip_compact.description: Transparent background + small majorFontSize + icon-after layout. Used for rows of small KPI tiles in a dense dashboard header strip. Combines several options at once.

options.icon: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><polyline points='23 6 13.5 15.5 8.5 10.5 1 18'/><polyline points='17 6 23 6 23 12'/></svg>
